# Personal Landing Page

## Description
This project is a personal landing page designed to showcase my projects, technical skills, and professional experience to recruiters and hiring managers. It acts as a central hub where I can highlight my work, demonstrate my data analytics abilities, and present myself beyond what a traditional resume allows. The site focuses on communicating both my technical skillset and my ability to collaborate and fit within a team.

## Features
- One-page professional portfolio layout for easy navigation  
- Dedicated sections for Bio, Skills, Projects, and Contact  
- Showcases real-world projects including dashboards, machine learning, and data analysis  
- Clean and minimal design focused on readability  
- Direct links to GitHub, LinkedIn, and contact information  
- Organized folder structure for maintainability and scalability  

## Tech Stack

| Technology | Purpose |
|-----------|--------|
| HTML5 | Provides the structure and semantic layout of the website |
| CSS3 | Handles styling, layout, and responsiveness |
| JavaScript | Adds small interactive elements and enhancements |
| GitHub | Version control and project hosting |

## Getting Started

### Prerequisites
- A modern web browser (Chrome, Safari)

### Installation
```bash
git clone https://github.com/lakem4/Lmauer1_PLP.git
cd Lmauer1_PLP
open index.html
